Skill Path: Flow

Your movements flow into one another, making you agile and hard to catch.

While developing your skills in Acrobatics you chose to focus specifically on Flow, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5YlHrBCZJmb6Q4Lz]{Slippery Prey}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.f0faBEUPtspdutKx]{Acrobatic Performer}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Qf1ylAbdVi1rkc8M]{Maneuver in Flight}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5YlHrBCZJmb6Q4Lz]{Slippery Prey}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.f0faBEUPtspdutKx]{Acrobatic Performer}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5I97q0FfAeXcUQhs]{Nimble Crawl}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.c9fHUSI5lRdXu1Ic]{Feather Step}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.pKnX7MGZayqZui0Z]{Aerobatics Mastery}
